name: BB:Threats: Scanning: Empty Responsive Flows High
notes: This BB detects potential reconnaissance activity where the source packet count is greater than 100,000.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Scanning: Empty Responsive Flows High on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the IP protocol is one of the following TCP
when the source packets is greater than 100000
when the source byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
when the destination byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
when the source bytes is greater than 1
when the destination bytes is greater than 1
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Scanning: Empty Responsive Flows High on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the IP protocol is one of the following TCP
AND when the source packets is greater than 100000
AND when the source byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
AND when the destination byte/packet ratio is less than 65 bytes/packet
AND when the source bytes is greater than 1
AND when the destination bytes is greater than 1
